title: Senior Doctor - Manipal Hospitals - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Manipal Hospitals - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Manipal Hospitals are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Manipal Hospitals:
Manipal Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
